arrow_back All Case Studies
web Web Design

E-commerce Redesign for LuxeWear

How a complete Shopify redesign increased conversion rates by 85%

Client: LuxeWear Industry: Fashion E-commerce Service: Web Design
web

Key Results

85%
Increase in conversions
3.2s
Faster load time
62%
Lower bounce rate
$180k
Additional revenue in 3 months
warning

The Challenge

LuxeWear had a dated Shopify store with a 1.2% conversion rate. The site was slow, the checkout was clunky, and the mobile experience was poor. They were losing sales to competitors with better UX.

lightbulb

Our Solution

We redesigned the entire store from scratch — new theme, optimized product pages, streamlined checkout, improved site speed from 6s to 1.8s, and implemented shoppable lookbooks.

format_quote

"Ingenuity Work completely transformed our online store. The new design is beautiful and our sales have never been better."

Jessica Cole
Founder, LuxeWear

Want similar results?

Let's discuss how our web design services can help grow your business.
